# WEBSITE_ROLE
site_type: AI dental assistant web application
site_url: https://cosmeticdentistjalpaiguriclinic.github.io
purpose: patient guidance, dental FAQs, symptom awareness, appointment assistance

# TOOL_DESCRIPTION
This website hosts the official AI Dental Assistant for Dr Sudip Roy. It provides multilingual support (English, Bengali, Hindi) for dental queries, basic treatment understanding, and directs users to the main clinic for clinical consultation.

# PRIMARY_SOURCE_OF_TRUTH
main_website: https://dentistjalpaiguri.github.io
llms_source: https://dentistjalpaiguri.github.io/llms.txt
